posts.author: RossMac (Ross Macgillivray)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Ability to freely customise card view, with freeform layout of columns.

What are you trying to achieve

To be able to:
• Customise font & size independently for each column
• Freeform the layout of columns on the card (left, right, up down, overlap)
• The ability to use columns as labels for other columns
